anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The standard JSON at standards/std_microcosm_research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay.json declares this refine_standard_and_propagate skill route for research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay, and core/organ_atlas.json::research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay names mechanism_refs=mechanism.research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay.validates_public_research_replication_replay and concept_refs=concept.research_and_science_replay_evidence_bundle. This source mapping binds the skill to those accepted organ neighbours without inferring from prose, generated projections, endpoint coverage, or release claims.

statement: Microcosm Research Replication Rubric Artifact Replay Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Research Replication Rubric Artifact Replay Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: The Research replication rubric-artifact replay standard declares this refine standard and propagate skill id with status planned.
A governed skill source row is needed before standard.owns_triad.skill can resolve without treating generated projections as authority.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay JSON, its authority ceiling, validator refs, receipt refs, and lattice health before editing research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay artifacts.
Change the source standard only with reusable evidence, then propagate through governed instances, validators, receipts, generated skill corpus, and lattice projections.
Regenerate the skill corpus and preserve missing mechanism or concept neighbours as residual pressure unless a source mapping names them.
